  Sliding Window. The user wants to add a Distributed Rate Limiting strategy, implemented in-memory. Since "distributed"
  usually implies multiple nodes, I'll implement a shared in-memory store to simulate this. I also need to check
  ratelimiter.go for the RateLimitAlgorithm type definition and add RateLimitAlgorithmDistributed.
